user_message: build a sci-fi laser pistol with greebles

spec.subject: a sci-fi laser pistol with greeble surface detail

framing.camera: low three-quarter front, slight upward tilt

lighting.key: cool blue-white from camera-left, 6500K, strong directional to catch hard-surface bevels
lighting.fill: warm amber bounce from camera-right, 3200K, one-third key intensity, softens shadow side
lighting.rim: tight cyan rim light from rear-right separating barrel tip and grip from dark background

palette.dominant: matte gunmetal dark grey #2A2D30-ish with subtle metallic sheen
palette.accent: glowing cyan energy cell and emissive barrel aperture #00E5FF-ish
palette.neutral: near-black void background with faint dark-blue vignette

composition.foreground: shallow-focus floor reflection catching cyan emissive glow
composition.midground: the laser pistol body centered and angled 30-degrees, occupying 70% of frame
composition.background: pure dark studio void, no distraction
composition.hero: the glowing cyan barrel aperture and emitter ring — the eye's first anchor

materials.notes: roughness 0.45, metallic 0.95, fine micro-scratch normal map, controlled bevels 0.5mm real-world, subtle edge wear on corners
roughness 0.35, metallic 1.0, panel seams 0.3mm deep, small bolts and vent slats baked into high-poly or modeled as geo
emissive cyan #00E5FF at strength 4.0, glass-like surface roughness 0.05, inner volumetric glow effect
roughness 0.85, metallic 0.0, diamond-knurl displacement texture, slight subsurface scatter for rubber feel

materials.type: polished dark steel with emissive inner ring
materials.notes: outer ring roughness 0.2 metallic 1.0, inner channel emissive cyan strength 8.0, tight chamfer bevel

density.scattered: none — isolated hero prop, no scatter elements

spec.scale_notes: Pistol is approximately 28cm long, 14cm tall grip-to-slide, 4cm wide. Real-world scale critical for correct bevel sizes and greeble proportions. Scene reads at roughly 50cm wide from camera at 85mm focal length.
